---
title: "Erg Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Read in original files
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(forcats)
crew2k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew2k.csv")
crew6k <- read_csv("keelinjoyce/rowing/crew6k.csv")
```

Wrangle data so both data sets match to easily join
```{r}
crew2k_bind <- crew2k |> mutate("Piece" = "2k test") |>
  rename("Trial" = "# 2k of season") 

crew6k_bind <- crew6k |> mutate("Sex" = 0) |>
  mutate(Trial = case_when(Date == "30-Jan" ~ 1,
                          Date == "6-Feb" ~ 2,
                          Date == "27-Feb" ~ 3))
``` 

Join both data sets
```{r}
erg_df <- bind_rows(crew2k_bind, crew6k_bind) |>
  select(-Date)
```

Save as a .csv file
```{r}
write_csv(erg_df, "erg_df.csv")
```
